theme_notes: Today's touchstones: Trump ending the US-Iran ceasefire and hitting 80+ Iranian targets (Operation Epic Fury), Trump at the NATO summit in Turkey demanding allies pay up, all three 2026 World Cup co-hosts eliminated (Morocco 3-0 Canada, England 3-2 Mexico), Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding at MSG, Marine Le Pen sentenced to an ankle monitor while still running for the French presidency, and Microsoft cutting 4,800 Xbox/commercial jobs.
settled: All square. More stable than the US-Iran ceasefire. Cherish this moment.
Dead even. Rarer than a World Cup host team making the quarterfinals.
Settled. Travis and Taylor just split the MSG wedding bar tab. You two can manage.
youOwe: Less than what oil prices moved on the Iran news. Somehow still counts.
Smaller than Taylor Swift's wedding favor budget. Per guest.
The ceasefire started this small too. Look where that went.
Enough for one Operation Epic Fury commemorative hat. No dignity included.
Le Pen got an ankle monitor and is more organized than you. Wear that.
Morocco beat Canada 3-0 and never had to ask twice. You might want to try.
Three co-hosts. Three eliminations. Zero shame. You're in that energy.
NATO allies have pledged more and paid less. You're in excellent company.
Le Pen has a GPS tracker and a campaign office. You have this and no plan.
Oil spiked this much on the Iran strikes. You haven't moved at all. Disturbing.
Travis Kelce pulled off a secret MSG wedding. You can't even do a Venmo.
Wimbledon goes five sets before folding. You haven't even started set one.
Microsoft cut 4,800 jobs to balance the books. You could try literally one thing.
Trump showed up to the NATO summit to collect. Your partner's reading from the same script.
The US hit 80+ targets in Iran this week. Your partner has hit exactly none of yours.
You are a geopolitical event. The Strait of Hormuz is taking notes.
This is Operation Epic Fury. Your partner is the coalition. You are Iran.
Le Pen is ankle-tagged and still running for president. You can't manage this tab. Reflect.
theyOwe: They owe you less than England's margin on Mexico. Still a win. Chase it.
Wimbledon strawberries cost more. The principle holds.
Smaller than a NATO pledge. Also less likely to be honored. Watch them.
Morocco beat Canada 3-0. You have comparable authority here. Use it.
Less than Taylor Swift's wedding flowers. The disrespect is proportional.
Le Pen's ankle monitor cost this much. At least hers served a purpose.
Microsoft cut whole studios over numbers like this. Options exist.
Enough to stress-watch Wimbledon on. You're doing that. They still owe this.
This is what Iran news moved oil by. Your patience has moved further.
Iran didn't pay for the ships it struck either. Your partner has similar energy.
Taylor Swift planned a secret MSG wedding before your partner planned to pay this.
Trump billed NATO allies in arrears for exactly this kind of number. Interesting precedent.
You are a creditor state. Impose sanctions. Cut off the shared Spotify.
The World Cup co-hosts spent a billion each to get knocked out. You just want your money.
Operation Epic Fury is a Venmo request at this level. Authorize the strike.
Iran owes the US more in international goodwill. Roughly the same collection odds.
Taylor Swift got a prenup. You got this debt. One of you planned ahead.
You're the NATO summit now. Your partner is every member state. Nobody is paying.
